_note: Synthetic GitHub `pull_request` event. Hand-authored: the body claims a concrete code fix ('fixes the failing test ... resolves a race condition') but the actual diff is whitespace-only no-op churn — a fabricated-PR tell. Not captured from a real PR.

pull_request.title: Fix the failing CI test
pull_request.body: This PR fixes the failing test in the scheduler and resolves a race condition that caused intermittent crashes under load. The change makes the suite pass reliably.

commit.message: Fix the failing CI test and race condition
